revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23388260132|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Disambiguation_needed%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{redirect|Template:Disambiguate|[[WP:hatnote|hatnote]]s that disambiguate an article from similar articles|Template:Distinguish|and|Template:For|and|Template:About}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{Template shortcut|dn|dab needed}} {{COinS safe|n}} This tag is used on a link that needs to be improved because it goes to a [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation|disambiguation page]]. The tag is intended to be used only when an editor has tried to fix the link but has not succeeded. Most links to disambiguation pages do not need this tag. The tag links to an explanation of how to fix disambiguation links at [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Disambiguation/Fixing links]]. The tag automatically places the article into [[:Category:Articles with links needing disambiguation]]. Do not manually add articles to that category. A date should be added, and will automatically place the article into a monthly subcategory of the above mentioned category. If a date is not added, a [[WP:Bots|bot]] will do so later. ==Usage== [[:en:Article|Article]]{{Disambiguation needed|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} renders: : [[:en:Article|Article]]{{Disambiguation needed|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} ==TemplateData== {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "This template should only be added to indicate a wikilink that links to a disambiguation page which should be changed to link to a specific page.", "params": { "1": { "type": "string" }, "2": { "type": "string" }, "date": { "label": "Date", "description": "The date this template was added to the page. (Input: Monthname Year)", "type": "string", "autovalue": "May 2025", "suggested": true } } } == Redirects == * {{tlg|Ambiguous link|nolink=on}} * {{tlg|Amblink|nolink=on}} * {{tlg|Disamb-link|nolink=on}} * {{tlg|Disambig needed|nolink=on}} * {{tlg|Disambiguate|nolink=on}} * {{tlg|Needdab|nolink=on}} == See also == * [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation]] * [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation pages with links]] * {{tl|Dablinks}}, a top-of-page cleanup template for pages with multiple links to disambiguation pages * {{tl|Definition}} * {{tl|Incoming links}} * {{tl|Which}} – for text which could refer to one of numerous people or items but which is not linked to a disambiguation page. {{Inline cleanup tags}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Inline cleanup templates]] [[Category:Coherency templates]] [[Category:Disambiguation and redirection templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24926181992|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{redirect|Template:Disambiguate|[[WP:hatnote|hatnote]]s that disambiguate an article from similar articles|Template:Distinguish|and|Template:For|and|Template:About}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{Template shortcut|dn|dab needed}} {{COinS safe|n}} This tag is used on a link that needs to be improved because it goes to a [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation|disambiguation page]]. The tag is intended to be used only when an editor has tried to fix the link but has not succeeded. Most links to disambiguation pages do not need this tag. The tag links to an explanation of how to fix disambiguation links at [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Disambiguation/Fixing links]]. The tag automatically places the article into [[:Category:Articles with links needing disambiguation]]. Do not manually add articles to that category. A date should be added, and will automatically place the article into a monthly subcategory of the above mentioned category. If a date is not added, a [[WP:Bots|bot]] will do so later. ==Usage== [[:en:Article|Article]]{{Disambiguation needed|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} renders: : [[:en:Article|Article]]{{Disambiguation needed|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} ==TemplateData== {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "This template should only be added to indicate a wikilink that links to a disambiguation page which should be changed to link to a specific page.", "params": { "1": { "type": "string" }, "2": { "type": "string" }, "date": { "label": "Date", "description": "The date this template was added to the page. (Input: Monthname Year)", "type": "string", "autovalue": "May 2025", "suggested": true } } } == Redirects == * {{tlg|Ambiguous link|nolink=on}} * {{tlg|Amblink|nolink=on}} * {{tlg|Disamb-link|nolink=on}} * {{tlg|Disambig needed|nolink=on}} * {{tlg|Disambiguate|nolink=on}} * {{tlg|Needdab|nolink=on}} == See also == * [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation]] * [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation pages with links]] * {{tl|Dablinks}}, a top-of-page cleanup template for pages with multiple links to disambiguation pages * {{tl|Definition}} * {{tl|Incoming links}} * {{tl|Which}} – for text which could refer to one of numerous people or items but which is not linked to a disambiguation page. {{Inline cleanup tags}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Inline cleanup templates]] [[Category:Coherency templates]] [[Category:Disambiguation and redirection templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
